META'S LATEST OPEN SOURCE RELEASES
articles.summary: Meta has released a large number of important and useful research artifacts including a speech-to-speech model, improved SAM, and many other interesting advances.

articles.title: ANTHROPIC JUST MADE IT HARDER FOR AI TO GO ROGUE WITH ITS UPDATED SAFETY POLICY
articles.summary: Anthropic updated its Responsible Scaling Policy to include Capability Thresholds for AI models that pose significant risks, such as bioweapons and autonomous AI research. This policy aims to set industry standards by introducing AI Safety Levels that require stricter safeguards based on model capabilities. By publicly disclosing safety practices and maintaining a Responsible Scaling Officer, Anthropic hopes to lead in AI governance and inspire similar approaches industry-wide.

articles.title: SAM ALTMAN'S WORLDCOIN BECOMES WORLD AND SHOWS NEW IRIS-SCANNING ORB TO PROVE YOUR HUMANITY
articles.summary: The World project, co-founded by Sam Altman, aims to verify human identity online using iris-scanning technology amidst privacy concerns and ongoing investigations in the EU. It plans to incorporate human verification into AI platforms and potentially redistribute AI-generated wealth through Worldcoins. Recent announcements include a new blockchain, app, and tools like Deep Face for combating deep fakes.

articles.title: SHORTCUT MODELS
articles.summary: Shortcut models are a new class of consistency like models that can generate continuous signals with very few inference steps.

articles.title: SABOTAGE EVALUATIONS FOR FRONTIER MODELS
articles.summary: Anthropic has performed a number of novel evaluations to determine weaknesses and how to measure misalignment in large and powerful models.

articles.title: ZERO-SHOT 3D VISUAL GROUNDING
articles.summary: VLM-Grounder is a new method for 3D visual grounding that overcomes the limitations of traditional approaches by using vision-language models (VLMs) and 2D images.

DigitalOcean has you covered: GPU Droplets are virtual machines powered by NVIDIA H100 GPUs [12] that make it easy to run AI workloads (training, inference) without blowing your budget. 1X and 8X configurations available. DEEPSEEK'S NATIVELY MULTIMODAL MODEL
articles.summary: DeepSeek has trained and released a 1.3b powerful model that can operate on interleaved text and images to both generate and understand.

articles.title: META'S LINGUA
articles.summary: Meta has created a simple and research friendly codebase that can reproduce Llama 2 7B in 24 hours.

articles.title: ALIGNING TEXT-TO-IMAGE MODELS WITH HUMAN VALUES
articles.summary: LiVO (Lightweight Value Optimization) is a novel method for aligning Text-to-Image models with human values.

articles.title: LONG CONTEXT CONTEST (KAGGLE COMPETITION)
articles.summary: The Gemini team has earmarked $100k for the best uses of their long context model capabilities.

articles.title: ALPHACODIUM OUTPERFORMS DIRECT PROMPTING OF O1 MODEL
articles.summary: OpenAI's o1 model, which exhibits System 1.5 thinking, shows enhanced reasoning capabilities compared to previous LLMs but still falls short of full System 2 deliberate problem-solving. AlphaCodium significantly improves o1's coding performance by providing a structured framework that guides reasoning and iterative refinement, achieving better accuracy on Codeforces benchmarks. While o1 and AlphaCodium together show promise in advancing AI toward deeper reasoning, much work remains to integrate full System 2 thinking in AI models.

articles.title: DUOLINGO CEO LUIS VON AHN THINKS AI HAS A LOT TO TEACH US
articles.summary: Duolingo's CEO, Luis von Ahn, discusses leveraging AI and gamification to enhance language learning through features like chat conversations with AI avatars and video game-like adventures generated by AI. The company recently introduced Duolingo Max, a higher-priced subscription plan that offers AI-driven conversation practice, as AI-generated content costs less and speeds up development. Despite AI's limitations in engagement, Duolingo focuses on keeping users motivated by balancing learning efficacy with gamified, entertaining experiences.

articles.title: AMAZON ADS' AI GENERATOR TOOL CAN NOW CREATE AUDIO ADS
articles.summary: Amazon is expanding its use of generative AI for creating audio ads through its self-service ad platform.

articles.title: GOOGLE SHOPPING IS GETTING A ‘FOR YOU' FEED OF PRODUCTS
articles.summary: Google Shopping has introduced AI-driven personalized feeds, which recommends products based on user searches and YouTube views.
